phrases.zh: 凯特把一个洋葱切成丁。

phrases.en: And fried it with some ground beef in a frying pan.
phrases.zh: 并在煎锅里把它和一些牛肉末一起煎。

phrases.en: As the beef-and-onion mixture fried, she stirred it.
phrases.zh: 牛肉和洋葱在煎的时候，她不停地搅拌。

phrases.en: When the meat was brown, she turned off the burner.
phrases.zh: 肉变成褐色后，她关掉了炉火。

phrases.en: She poured the fat off into a can.
phrases.zh: 她把油脂倒进一个罐子里。

phrases.en: She heated two cans of tomato sauce in a saucepan.
phrases.zh: 她在锅里加热了两罐番茄酱。

phrases.en: She added the mixture of beef and onions.
phrases.zh: 她加入了牛肉和洋葱的混合物。

phrases.en: And stirred it into the sauce with some spices.
phrases.zh: 并加入一些香料，把它拌进酱里。

phrases.en: When it started to boil, she turned down the heat and let the sauce simmer.
phrases.zh: 酱开始沸腾时，她把火调小，让酱慢慢炖。

phrases.en: In another pan, she boiled some water.
phrases.zh: 她在另一个锅里烧开了一些水。

phrases.en: She put some spaghetti into the boiling water.
phrases.zh: 她把一些意大利面放进开水里。

phrases.en: And boiled it until it was tender.
In a colander, she drained the spaghetti.
phrases.zh: 她用滤盆把意大利面沥干。

phrases.en: After putting the spaghetti on a plate, she ladled some sauce over it.
phrases.zh: 把意大利面盛到盘子里后，她舀了一些酱浇在上面。
